message:
fix(hashing): enforce deterministic content hashes by sorting collections before hashing

Across seven source files, replace hash inputs that iterated over unsorted
collections (decisions, boundaries, experiments, batches, signals, assumptions,
caveats, statistical frameworks, validation methodology, limitations, bundle
entries, bundle boundaries, trigger boundaries) with sort-then-hash patterns,
making content hashes deterministic regardless of insertion order.

In hindsight_escalation_bundle, extend bundle hash to include redaction
treatment and complete flag. Expand EscalationSummary hash to include all
summary counters (suppressed, deferred, total_bundles, budget_utilization,
remaining_budget, by_kind, by_severity). Fix cost_budget_millionths in
the receipt via pre-decision budget capture (budget_before).

Expand GovernanceReport/GovernanceSummary hashes similarly. New tests cover
mandatory experiment hash sensitivity, summary field sensitivity, redaction
and completeness hash changes, and budget preservation for forced auto
escalation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
